visualizegate.card.linked.title: Links to an existing gate
visualizegate.card.linked.offset_big: Large offset: may be pulled to another gate
visualizegate.card.will_create.title: A new gate will be created
visualizegate.card.will_create.desc: No existing gate ahead. Stepping through creates one with no offset.
visualizegate.card.unknown.title: Link target unconfirmed
visualizegate.card.unknown.desc: Far side unexplored. Visit it to determine the link.
visualizegate.card.cave.risk: May generate underground / in a cave (~%s below surface)
visualizegate.card.cave.nether_enclosed: Nether side is generated enclosed (low cave risk)
visualizegate.card.cave.detail: Target Y %s vs est. surface Y %s
visualizegate.guide.title: How to use
visualizegate.guide.1.title: Welcome
visualizegate.guide.1.body1: A mod that visualizes Nether gate links.
visualizegate.guide.1.body2: Everything is client-side, with no Mixins.
visualizegate.guide.2.title: Look at a portal
visualizegate.guide.2.body1: Look at a portal and its link state shows
visualizegate.guide.2.body2: automatically, with color and plain words.
visualizegate.guide.3.title: Hold flint and steel
visualizegate.guide.3.body2: link line, search range, zero-offset spot.
visualizegate.guide.4.title: Press V for the hub
visualizegate.guide.4.body1: Press V to open the hub and view
visualizegate.guide.4.body2: the whole map as a point cloud.
